rationale.ai-review: Multi-agent LLM system judges commits: vulnerabilities, consistency, format, revision
rationale.agent-scope-drift: QA-Checker detects and corrects agents' drift from original review intent
rationale.risk-security: Contributes vulnerability-detection mechanism; evaluated, 449 confirmed vulnerabilities
rationale.risk-quality: Mitigation evaluated: format/consistency checking and code revision quality
rationale.general-code: Reviews human commits/PRs; AI sits on review side only
